name: BreadcrumbItem
description: Business object representing a single breadcrumb item in the navigation path

properties.name: label
properties.description: Display text for the breadcrumb item

properties.name: text
properties.description: Alternative to 'label' - display text for the breadcrumb item

properties.name: href
properties.description: URL or route for the breadcrumb link

properties.name: status
properties.description: Status of the item: completed, working, notyetstarted
